<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es">

<head>

<!-- skill:chrome -->

<style>

/* Credit line — bottom-right */

.design-ui-credit {

position: fixed;

bottom: 12px;

right: 12px;

font: 11px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;

color: rgba(128,128,128,0.5);

pointer-events: none;

z-index: 2147483647;

transition: opacity 0.4s ease;

user-select: none;

letter-spacing: 0.02em;

}


/* Hide chrome on touch devices */

@media (hover: none) {

.design-ui-credit { display: none; }

}


/* Print fixes */

@media print {

* {

transition: none !important;

animation: none !important;

box-shadow: none !important;

}

body {

print-color-adjust: exact;

-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;

}

.design-ui-credit { display: none !important; }

}


</style>

<script>

(function () {

// Chrome UI (hover devices only): credit badge with idle-fade.

// Deferred until body exists since the script may run in <head>.

function initChromeUI() {

if (!matchMedia('(hover: hover)').matches) return;


var credit = document.createElement('div');

credit.className = 'design-ui-credit';

credit.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

credit.innerHTML = '\u{1F49C} by ClickUp Brain';

document.body.appendChild(credit);


var timer = null;

var fade = function (out) { credit.style.opacity = out ? '0' : ''; };

fade(true);

var show = function () {

fade(false);

clearTimeout(timer);

timer = setTimeout(function () { fade(true); }, 3000);

};

document.addEventListener('mousemove', show);

show();

}

if (document.readyState === 'loading') {

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initChromeUI);

} else {

initChromeUI();

}

})();


</script>

<!-- /skill:chrome -->

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>Diagrama de Gantt - Proyecto Integrador</title>

<link href="Googleapisfonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }


body {

font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;

background: oklch(99% 0.002 250);

color: oklch(22% 0.01 250);

font-optical-sizing: auto;

overflow-x: auto;

}


.page {

min-width: 1400px;

padding: 36px 40px;

}


header {

margin-bottom: 28px;

display: flex;

align-items: baseline;

justify-content: space-between;

}


h1 {

font-size: 1.4rem;

font-weight: 700;

color: oklch(15% 0.01 250);

letter-spacing: -0.02em;

}


.header-meta {

font-size: 0.78rem;

color: oklch(50% 0.006 250);

}


.gantt-container {

display: grid;

grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;

border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.006 250);

border-radius: 6px;

overflow: hidden;

background: oklch(100% 0.001 250);

}


.task-list {

border-right: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.006 250);

background: oklch(97.5% 0.003 250);

}


.task-list-header {

display: grid;

grid-template-columns: 1fr 70px;

padding: 10px 14px;

font-size: 0.68rem;

font-weight: 600;

text-transform: uppercase;

letter-spacing: 0.06em;

color: oklch(45% 0.006 250);

background: oklch(95% 0.004 250);

border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.006 250);

height: 52px;

align-items: end;

}


.task-row {

display: grid;

grid-template-columns: 1fr 70px;

padding: 0 14px;

height: 32px;

align-items: center;

border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(94% 0.003 250);

font-size: 0.73rem;

}


.task-row:hover {

background: oklch(96% 0.005 250);

}


.task-row.phase-row {

background: oklch(95.5% 0.005 250);

font-weight: 600;

font-size: 0.72rem;

height: 30px;

color: oklch(30% 0.01 250);

}


.task-name-cell {

white-space: nowrap;

overflow: hidden;

text-overflow: ellipsis;

padding-right: 8px;

}


.task-assignee {

font-size: 0.67rem;

color: oklch(52% 0.006 250);

white-space: nowrap;

overflow: hidden;

text-overflow: ellipsis;

}


.timeline {

overflow-x: auto;

position: relative;

}


.timeline-header {

display: flex;

height: 52px;

border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.006 250);

background: oklch(95% 0.004 250);

flex-direction: column;

}


.month-row {

display: flex;

height: 22px;

align-items: center;

}


.month-label {

font-size: 0.7rem;

font-weight: 600;

color: oklch(35% 0.008 250);

padding-left: 6px;

border-left: 1px solid oklch(85% 0.006 250);

height: 100%;

display: flex;

align-items: center;

}


.days-row {

display: flex;

height: 30px;

align-items: end;

}


.day-label {

font-size: 0.6rem;

color: oklch(55% 0.005 250);

text-align: center;

padding-bottom: 3px;

border-left: 1px solid oklch(92% 0.003 250);

}


.day-label.weekend {

background: oklch(96% 0.004 250);

}


.timeline-body {

position: relative;

}


.timeline-row {

height: 32px;

position: relative;

border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(94% 0.003 250);

display: flex;

align-items: center;

}


.timeline-row.phase-row {

height: 30px;

background: oklch(95.5% 0.005 250);

}


.day-col {

position: absolute;

top: 0;

bottom: 0;

border-left: 1px solid oklch(94% 0.003 250);

}


.day-col.weekend {

background: oklch(97% 0.003 250);

}


.day-col.today {

background: oklch(92% 0.04 250);

border-left: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.15 250);

}


.bar {

position: absolute;

height: 18px;

border-radius: 3px;

top: 7px;

min-width: 6px;

opacity: 0.92;

}


.bar-eduart { background: oklch(62% 0.13 250); }

.bar-sujey { background: oklch(62% 0.13 330); }

.bar-david { background: oklch(58% 0.12 145); }

.bar-team { background: oklch(55% 0.1 40); }

.bar-none { background: oklch(70% 0.04 250); }

.bar-done { background: oklch(75% 0.06 155); opacity: 0.7; }


.legend {

margin-top: 20px;

display: flex;

gap: 20px;

align-items: center;

font-size: 0.75rem;

color: oklch(45% 0.006 250);

}


.legend-item {

display: flex;

align-items: center;

gap: 6px;

}


.legend-bar {

width: 24px;

height: 10px;

border-radius: 2px;

}


@media print {

body { overflow: visible; }

.page { min-width: auto; padding: 16px; }

.gantt-container { font-size: 9px; }

}

</style>

</head>

<body>

<div class="page">


<header>

<h1>Diagrama de Gantt: Proyecto Integrador</h1>

<span class="header-meta">14 mayo – 16 julio 2026 · 84 tareas</span>

</header>


<div class="gantt-container" id="gantt"></div>


<div class="legend">

<div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-bar bar-eduart"></div> Eduart</div>

<div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-bar bar-sujey"></div> Sujey</div>

<div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-bar bar-david"></div> David</div>

<div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-bar bar-team"></div> Equipo</div>

<div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-bar bar-done"></div> Terminado</div>

<div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-bar" style="background: none; border-left: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.15 250); width: 2px;"></div> Hoy (19 jun)</div>

</div>


</div>


<script>

const tasks = [

{ phase: "Fase 1: Documentación Inicial", isPhase: true },

{ name: "Bitácora 14/05", start: "2026-05-14", end: "2026-05-15", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Acta consecutiva", start: "2026-05-19", end: "2026-05-21", who: "team", done: true },

{ name: "Plantilla Activos y Diagrama", start: "2026-05-19", end: "2026-05-20", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Bitácoras mayo (varias)", start: "2026-05-21", end: "2026-05-25", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Bitácora 03/06", start: "2026-06-02", end: "2026-06-03", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Bitácora 06/06", start: "2026-06-05", end: "2026-06-06", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Documento del proyecto", start: "2026-06-07", end: "2026-06-09", who: "team", done: true },

{ name: "Información Sensible", start: "2026-06-07", end: "2026-06-08", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Bitácora 08/06", start: "2026-06-08", end: "2026-06-08", who: "none", done: true },

{ name: "Bitácora 10/06", start: "2026-06-10", end: "2026-06-10", who: "david", done: true },

{ name: "C2. Bitácora de Reunión", start: "2026-06-10", end: "2026-06-11", who: "none", done: true },


{ phase: "Fase 2: Análisis y Diseño", isPhase: true },

{ name: "Bitácora 16/06", start: "2026-06-16", end: "2026-06-17", who: "none", done: false },

{ name: "Bitácora 18/06", start: "2026-06-18", end: "2026-06-19", who: "eduart", done: true },

{ name: "Documento de requerimientos", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-19", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Documento de Análisis y Diseño", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Diagrama C4 Model", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Diagrama ER (PostgreSQL)", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Esquema ChromaDB", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Esquema AMQP (RabbitMQ)", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Rutas HTTP (Swagger)", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Diagramas Secuencia UML", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "Diagrama Navegación (Figma)", start: "2026-06-19", end: "2026-06-20", who: "eduart", done: false },


{ phase: "Fase 3: Sprint 1 (Core)", isPhase: true },

{ name: "Microservicio autenticación", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Microservicio clustering proyectos", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Microservicio Notificaciones", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "API Gateway", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas Autenticación", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas proyecto", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas home", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas Login/Registro (David)", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas Home Alumno/Inspiración (Sujey)", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas Perfil/Subida/Análisis (Eduart)", start: "2026-06-21", end: "2026-06-23", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "1ra Conexión Microservicios-Móvil", start: "2026-06-23", end: "2026-06-23", who: "team", done: false },


{ phase: "Fase 4: Sprint 2 (Extensión)", isPhase: true },

{ name: "Microservicio grupos", start: "2026-06-23", end: "2026-06-28", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "Microservicio clustering alumnos", start: "2026-06-23", end: "2026-06-28", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Microservicio clustering materias", start: "2026-06-23", end: "2026-06-28", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "Microservicio LLM", start: "2026-06-23", end: "2026-06-28", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Microservicio Orquestación", start: "2026-06-23", end: "2026-06-28", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas profesor", start: "2026-06-25", end: "2026-06-30", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Vista editar perfil", start: "2026-06-25", end: "2026-06-26", who: "sujey", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas Dashboard/Bandeja/Reglas (Eduart)", start: "2026-06-24", end: "2026-06-26", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Vista equipos", start: "2026-06-26", end: "2026-06-29", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Vistas Directorio/Gestión equipo", start: "2026-06-25", end: "2026-06-27", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "2da Conexión Microservicios-Móvil", start: "2026-06-30", end: "2026-07-05", who: "team", done: false },


{ phase: "Fase 5: Integración y Pruebas", isPhase: true },

{ name: "Verificación microservicios independientes", start: "2026-07-05", end: "2026-07-09", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Pruebas estrés servidores", start: "2026-07-09", end: "2026-07-11", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Ejecución pruebas (Eduart)", start: "2026-07-12", end: "2026-07-15", who: "eduart", done: false },

{ name: "Ejecución pruebas (David)", start: "2026-07-12", end: "2026-07-15", who: "david", done: false },

{ name: "Ejecución pruebas (Sujey)", start: "2026-07-12", end: "2026-07-15", who: "sujey", done: false },


{ phase: "Fase 6: Documentación Final", isPhase: true },

{ name: "Auditoría de seguridad", start: "2026-07-01", end: "2026-07-04", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Logs de ejecución", start: "2026-07-04", end: "2026-07-05", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Matriz de Cobertura", start: "2026-07-05", end: "2026-07-06", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Matriz de pruebas", start: "2026-07-06", end: "2026-07-07", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Plan de pruebas", start: "2026-07-07", end: "2026-07-08", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Plantilla de pruebas", start: "2026-07-08", end: "2026-07-09", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Reporte estrés hardware", start: "2026-07-09", end: "2026-07-10", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Manual de despliegue", start: "2026-07-10", end: "2026-07-12", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Manual de mantenimiento", start: "2026-07-12", end: "2026-07-14", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Reporte CACEI", start: "2026-07-15", end: "2026-07-16", who: "team", done: false },

{ name: "Manual de usuario", start: "2026-07-15", end: "2026-07-16", who: "team", done: false },

];


const projectStart = new Date("2026-05-14");

const projectEnd = new Date("2026-07-16");

const today = new Date("2026-06-19");

const dayWidth = 18;

const months = ["Ene","Feb","Mar","Abr","May","Jun","Jul","Ago","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dic"];

const dayNames = ["D","L","M","X","J","V","S"];


function daysBetween(a, b) {

return Math.round((b - a) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));

}


const totalDays = daysBetween(projectStart, projectEnd) + 1;


function render() {

const container = document.getElementById('gantt');


// Build task list

let taskListHTML = `<div class="task-list"><div class="task-list-header"><span>Tarea</span><span>Resp.</span></div>`;

tasks.forEach(t => {

if (t.isPhase) {

taskListHTML += `<div class="task-row phase-row"><span class="task-name-cell">${t.phase}</span><span></span></div>`;

} else {

const assigneeMap = { eduart: "Eduart", sujey: "Sujey", david: "David", team: "Equipo", none: "—" };

taskListHTML += `<div class="task-row"><span class="task-name-cell">${t.name}</span><span class="task-assignee">${assigneeMap[t.who]}</span></div>`;

}

});

taskListHTML += `</div>`;


// Build timeline

let timelineHTML = `<div class="timeline" style="width: ${totalDays * dayWidth}px;">`;


// Header: months + days

let monthRowHTML = `<div class="month-row">`;

let daysRowHTML = `<div class="days-row">`;

let currentMonth = -1;

let monthDayCount = 0;


for (let i = 0; i < totalDays; i++) {

const d = new Date(projectStart);

d.setDate(d.getDate() + i);

const m = d.getMonth();

const dow = d.getDay();

const isWeekend = dow === 0 || dow === 6;


if (m !== currentMonth) {

if (currentMonth !== -1) {

monthRowHTML += `<div class="month-label" style="width:${monthDayCount * dayWidth}px">${months[currentMonth]} 2026</div>`;

}

currentMonth = m;

monthDayCount = 0;

}

monthDayCount++;


daysRowHTML += `<div class="day-label${isWeekend ? ' weekend' : ''}" style="width:${dayWidth}px">${d.getDate()}</div>`;

}

monthRowHTML += `<div class="month-label" style="width:${monthDayCount * dayWidth}px">${months[currentMonth]} 2026</div>`;

monthRowHTML += `</div>`;

daysRowHTML += `</div>`;


timelineHTML += `<div class="timeline-header">${monthRowHTML}${daysRowHTML}</div>`;


// Body: day columns + bars

timelineHTML += `<div class="timeline-body">`;


// Day column lines

for (let i = 0; i < totalDays; i++) {

const d = new Date(projectStart);

d.setDate(d.getDate() + i);

const dow = d.getDay();

const isWeekend = dow === 0 || dow === 6;

const isToday = d.toDateString() === today.toDateString();

let cls = "day-col";

if (isToday) cls += " today";

else if (isWeekend) cls += " weekend";

timelineHTML += `<div class="${cls}" style="left:${i * dayWidth}px; width:${dayWidth}px;"></div>`;

}


// Task bars

tasks.forEach(t => {

if (t.isPhase) {

timelineHTML += `<div class="timeline-row phase-row"></div>`;

} else {

const startDate = new Date(t.start);

const endDate = new Date(t.end);

const startOffset = daysBetween(projectStart, startDate);

const duration = daysBetween(startDate, endDate) + 1;

let barClass = "bar";

if (t.done) barClass += " bar-done";

else barClass += ` bar-${t.who}`;

timelineHTML += `<div class="timeline-row"><div class="${barClass}" style="left:${startOffset * dayWidth + 2}px; width:${duration * dayWidth - 4}px;"></div></div>`;

}

});


timelineHTML += `</div></div>`;


container.innerHTML = taskListHTML + timelineHTML;

}


render();

</script>

</body>

</html>
